notes: I could not believe it, but for me it works MUCH better than on Windows because there is no way to run Atlas in AMD Crossfire-Mode on Windows. With Proton it runs Out of the Box. It takes full use of 2x RX570.  Because of this i got a much better Performance than on Win10 + better Graphics. I tried everything to get this work on Windows, but had no success.
